actions.reasoning: Hard earnings catalyst: record Q3 double-beat on both EPS and revenue, plus raised full-year FY26 guidance with FY27 growth outlook of ~30% and AI segment growing 2x. Multiple analyst PT raises (Needham $80, Rosenblatt $80, Stifel $75) confirm fundamental substance. Extension vs 20d high is deeply negative (-18.8%), meaning the stock was significantly depressed before this beat — classic PEAD setup with room to recover prior levels.
actions.exit_thesis: Relative volume is just below the 2x threshold (1.93), suggesting institutional participation may be moderate and the gap could stall near analyst PT consensus around $80.

news_since_entry.summary: Dow falls over 1% as stocks trade lower. Energy shares surge, materials stocks decline. Wholesale inventories and mortgage applications decline.

news_since_entry.headline: Penguin Solutions Posts Strong Q3 With AI Growing 2X; These Analysts Raise Price Targets On FY27 Outlook Of 30% Growth
news_since_entry.summary: PENG stock rises on upbeat Q3 results, with Needham raising PT to $80 & Rosenblatt to $80. Company raises FY26 guidance.

news_since_entry.headline: These Analysts Boost Their Forecasts On Penguin Solutions After Upbeat Q3 Results
news_since_entry.summary: Penguin Solutions (NASDAQ:PENG) reported strong Q3 results, beating estimates for EPS and revenue. Fiscal year guidance also raised. Stock rose 17%.

actions.reason: Original earnings catalyst intact with analyst PT raises confirmed, stock is near entry at 0.04R with room to run toward the ~$80 consensus PT, and no news debunks the thesis.
